response: KEEP THE AREA CLEAN: BRUSH GENTLY, RINSE THOROUGHLY, AND AVOID FOOD. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* CLEANING THE AREA IS A KEY STEP IN MAINTAINING ORAL HYGIENE. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* USING A SOFT BRUSH HELPS PREVENT ADDITIONAL DAMAGE. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* RINSE WITH WATER TO REMOVE FOOD PARTICLES. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* STAY AWAY FROM HARD FOODS AND CHOOSE SOFT OPTIONS. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* AVOIDING HARD FOODS IS IMPORTANT TO PREVENT FURTHER DAMAGE. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* CHOOSE SOFT FOODS TO REDUCE PAIN AND SENSITIVITY. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* USE TEMPORARY FILLING MATERIALS IF AVAILABLE. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* TEMPORARY FILLING MATERIALS PROVIDE SHORT-TERM PROTECTION. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS TO ENSURE SAFE USE. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* PAIN RELIEF IS ESSENTIAL FOR COMFORT. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* USE IBUPROFEN OR ACETAMINOPHEN AS NEEDED. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* AVOID ASPIRIN TO PREVENT BLEEDING. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* SALTWATER RINSING HELPS REDUCE INFLAMMATION. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* RINSE WITH WARM SALTWATER TO CLEANSE THE MOUTH. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* THIS RINSE REDUCES BACTERIA AND INFLAMMATION. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* CHOOSE THE OPPOSITE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO CHOOSE THE SIDE TO
